headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -47.4)
key_insights: Fears trending up 35% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 159 quotes and an overwhelming 131 at strong intensity, driving a score of 39.6 as people are venting forcefully today.
• Frustrations sit in the upper quarter of their 178-day range, while Fears and Optimism both remain in negative territory, though Optimism recovered notably from yesterday's low of -43.9.
• Fears edged up slightly from yesterday but stay well below average, suggesting anxiety is not a major driver today despite the volume of 76 quotes.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
